Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend The Answer By Striking The Name Of Defendant Adam Bauer And Adding The Name Of Defendant Hertz Vehicles, Llc
Off Calendar Sep-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT HERTZ VEHICLES, LLC'S Motion To Amend The Answer By Striking The Name Of Defendant Adam Bauer And Adding The Name Of Defendant Hertz Vehicles, LLC is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
